testcase.name: test_calendar_events

failure.message: AssertionError: assert 'events' in {'data': [{'all_day': False, 'assigned_to': [], 'created_at': '2026-04-08T18:32:07.676180+00:00', 'created_by': 'system', ...}, {'all_day': False, 'assigned_to': [], 'beo_notes': 'Live band setup by 4pm. Cake cutting at 9pm.', 'created_at': '2026-04-08T18:32:07.665580+00:00', ...}, {'all_day': False, 'assigned_to': [], 'created_at': '2026-04-08T18:32:07.676320+00:00', 'created_by': 'system', ...}, {'all_day': False, 'assigned_to': [], 'created_at': '2026-04-08T18:32:07.676044+00:00', 'created_by': 'system', ...}, {'all_day': False, 'assigned_to': [], 'beo_notes': 'AV setup required. NDA room — no housekeeping during session.', 'created_at': '2026-04-08T18:32:07.675630+00:00', ...}, {'all_day': False, 'assigned_to': [], 'created_at': '2026-04-08T18:32:07.675890+00:00', 'created_by': 'system', ...}, ...], 'total': 15}
